info.description: Sub-page under Shop > New In. All visible copy is editable here so Anna can change the landing without touching code.

kicker.description: Small uppercase label above the title.

kicker_colour.description: Hex colour for the kicker label. Default is the brand green for the Shop section.

paragraph_1.default: The latest arrivals. New pieces designed with intention, made to be worn every day. Every piece is handmade in Anna's Design Lab on Taggs Island, using ethically sourced materials.
paragraph_1.description: First body paragraph. Leave blank to skip.

paragraph_2.default: Anna moved all manufacturing to the UK to uphold quality and ethical production. Each piece is crafted as a cherished keepsake, vibrant, personalised designs that empower you to express your unique style.
paragraph_2.description: Second body paragraph. Leave blank to skip.

paragraph_3.default: New pieces are added regularly. Sign up to Reset Letters for first access and behind-the-scenes stories about each new collection.
paragraph_3.description: Third body paragraph. Leave blank to skip.

paragraph_4.description: Fourth body paragraph (optional). Leave blank to skip.

cta_label.description: Call-to-action button text at the bottom of the page.

cta_url.description: Where the CTA button links to.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override (60 chars max). Leave blank to use the page/item name. Shown in Google search results and browser tabs.

seo_description.description: Short summary for Google and ChatGPT (1-2 sentences, ~155 chars). Write what someone searching for this would actually type. Fills in automatically when you Save — leave blank unless you want to override
